changes.value:
Register grid.* commands as a CommandScopeProvider when GridView mounts. Wire keyboard events to useGrid navigation functions.

**Update `ui/src/components/grid-view.tsx`:**
- [ ] Build `CommandDef[]` array for grid.* commands with vim/cua/emacs keybindings per architecture spec
- [ ] Wrap DataTable in `<CommandScopeProvider commands={gridCommands}>` or `<FocusScope>`
- [ ] Connect execute functions: grid.upâ†’moveUp, grid.downâ†’moveDown, grid.leftâ†’moveLeft, grid.rightâ†’moveRight, grid.topâ†’moveToTop, grid.bottomâ†’moveToBottom, grid.firstColâ†’moveToFirstCol, grid.lastColâ†’moveToLastCol, grid.editâ†’enterEdit, grid.selectToggleâ†’toggleSelection, grid.selectDownâ†’selectDown, grid.selectUpâ†’selectUp
- [ ] Grid container div: `tabIndex={0}`, auto-focus on mount
- [ ] Grid commands appear in command palette when grid is focused
- [ ] Commands pass through to parent scope when not handled (e.g., `:view board`)

**Verify:**
- [ ] h/j/k/l (vim) navigate cells with visible cursor movement
- [ ] Arrow keys (cua) navigate cells
- [ ] gg/G jump to top/bottom
- [ ] 0/$ jump to first/last column
- [ ] V toggles row selection highlight
